attrs.title: 2D mission planner — coming soon

attrs.class: mb-2 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-on-surface-variant

children: Hostile mechanized elements have pushed across the northern border under cover of a winter storm. Command has tasked us with holding the line until reinforcements arrive. Expect contested airspace and degraded visibility.
Escort the VIP convoy to extraction
No ORBAT slots defined for this mission.
